Welcome to Electric Octopus — Discover how to thrive online with creative excellence and smart strategy

Unlock Peak Performance in Outbound Sales

Struggling with low conversion rates?

If you are looking to take your sales performance to the next level and capture demand for your product or services. Compare our outbound pricing plans.

Top ad strategies in your inbox!

Elevate your marketing with proven system

WE BUILD

Our Outreach Process

Forget the manual grind.  The AI-powered custom sales system automate your multi channel outbound campaign – sequences, messages, and meetings – giving you back valuable time to focus on closing deals. Convert website traffic into leads with AI. Set the goal, feed the AI with ICP info, and voila! – you’ll see leads booked right on your calendar.

1

Onboarding

  • 360° business analysis
  • Data-driven goal setting
  • Custom strategy blueprint
2

ICP , GTM & CX

  • Ideal Customer Profile creation
  • Decision-making trigger identification
  • Personalized buyer journey mapping
3

Automation System Integration

  • Persuasive, data-backed copywriting
  • Conversion-optimized design
  • A/B testing for continuous improvement
4

Digital Product & service design

Transform casual visitors into eager prospects with our cutting-edge lead capture optimization. We don't just collect leads; we cultivate relationships from the first click

  • Boost conversion rates dramatically
  • Expand into new markets seamlessly
  • Automate your way to higher profits
  • Create lasting customer relationships
  • Integrate with CRM for seamless data
  • Implement goal tracking in Google Analytics
5

Programme Design

  • Content-driven lead generation
  • Insight-based targeted outreach
  • Multi-channel campaign execution

Choose Your Package

Plans for today, and the future of your company

Our prospecting fees are based on the type of prospecting work and client’s requirements. A number of factors influence that, including time, frequency, type and the scope of client’s project.

US Dollars $
Euros €
British Pounds £

Kickstart Package

Plug-In Team : Start your prospecting journey with targeted outreach and proven conversion tactics

*Tools: Prices of tools are not included in the package.

From $3,250/monthly

Minimum 3 months commitment
  • Market research
  • Database preparation (1000 contacts)
  • LinkedIn & Email account preparation
  • Message sequences copywriting
  • Outbound configuration and optimization
  • Basic integration with CRM
  • Lead generation tools automation
  • Preparation of reports and data analysis
  • Access to GTM & RevOps Experts
Most Popular

Enhanced Package

Done-For-You: Accelerate growth with multi-channel prospecting and a custom landing page integrated with Adobe, Google Analytics

*Tools: Prices of tools are not included in the package.

From $7,550/monthly

Minimum 3 months commitment
  • Market research
  • Database preparation (5000 contacts)
  • LinkedIn & Email account preparation
  • Message sequences copywriting
  • One custom landing page
  • Basic integration with CRM
  • Lead generation tools automation
  • Preparation of reports and data analysis
  • Access to GTM & RevOps Experts

Custom Package

Minimum 6 months Commitment

We discuss your project before we make a custom offer, a fixed / monthly rate to Maximize market penetration with enterprise-grade prospecting infrastructure

  • Market research
  • Database preparation(2500 contacts)
  • LinkedIn & Email account preparation
  • Message sequences copywriting
  • Cold leads and arrange meetings
  • Advance integration with CRM
  • Lead generation tools automation
  • Preparation of reports and data analysis
  • Access to GTM & RevOps Experts

Expert Insights

What Make Our Prospecting Services Different?

We solve your digital marketing challenges with data-driven, industry-specific strategies that deliver measurable ROI. Our agile approach and cutting-edge tools ensure your business stays ahead in the ever-evolving digital world, turning your marketing investments into tangible growth.

Personalization

We only send highly personalized & targeted emails, we're not just hopelessly spamming and ruining your reputation.

Experience

After Designing well over 2k landing pages for our clients, it's likely that I've already seen success in your industry.

Revenue-Focused

We prioritize targeting high-quality prospects that are more likely to convert, instead of booking meaningless meetings.

Transparent Processes

What to Expect

Gain a committed ally invested in your long-term success . Work with a GTM automation expert team that values your input and industry knowledge . Get detailed reports showcasing tangible improvements and outcomes.

Experience holistic marketing

Benefit from customer-centric strategies

data-driven strategies

Access Cutting-Edge Tools

Receive transparent reporting

Mini Course

Get a  growth strategy that comes with the vital website tracking tools you can use

Get more leads from social media ads in 28 days, guaranteed*. For only $37.99, I'll show you how to get more leads from social media ads (or I'll work for free until you do*)

Trusted by Many

Here are unfiltered, raw testimonials
from our customers

Sarah Chen 10:30 AM

New website went live yesterday. Conversion rate jumped from 1.8% to 4.2% overnight. Form completions up 167%. This is what data-driven design looks like.

8
Mikael Kayanian 10:45 AM

Your team killed features you loved but users ignored. Great design is mostly about what you don't build.

22 12

10 replies Last reply 2 days ago

Marcus Thompson 09:42 AM

Just closed our biggest deal this quarter—$340K ARR. Came directly from the ABM campaign you launched 6 weeks ago. The targeting was surgical.

8

9 replies Last reply 3 days ago

Mikael Kayanian 10:00 AM

That ICP workshop we did in week two. When you know exactly who buys and why, campaigns write themselves.

19
David Martinez 11:30 AM

Just ran the numbers. Before you guys: 200 leads/month, 3-4 closed deals. After your scoring system: junk leads down 67%, close rate from 2% to 11%. Sales team is actually happy now

15 80
Mikael Kayanian 11:45 AM

That brutal feedback your sales team gave us in week one built the right qualification framework. Honest conversations make this work.

32 32

8 replies Last reply 6 days ago

Priya Sharma 4:00 PM

Our attribution was completely broken. Couldn't prove ROI on anything. You built proper tracking in 3 weeks. Now I know exactly what drives revenue down to the channel and keyword.

Mikael Kayanian 4:45 PM

You can't optimize what you can't measure. Clean data infrastructure first, growth tactics second.

45 49
Jennifer Park 11:40 AM

Last agency sent us "leads" that sales wouldn't touch. You rebuilt everything from scratch. Qualified pipeline up 156%, CAC down 34%. Marketing and sales actually aligned now.

Mikael Kayanian 04:15 PM

Alignment isn't a workshop—it's shared metrics and real accountability. Your revenue ops team executing on that made all the difference.

6 replies Last reply 2 days ago

Alex Rivera 06:00 PM

Three agencies promised "thought leadership" and delivered generic LinkedIn posts. You built a real system. Our CEO's LinkedIn drove $2.3M pipeline last quarter.

6 replies Last reply 3 days ago

Frequently Asked Questions

Here’s Our Common
Question We Had So Far

I specialize in crafting data-driven strategies that drive growth and engagement across performance marketing, email campaigns, and B2B initiatives. Explore my portfolio to see how I transform ideas into impactful results.

We combine multiple data sources to create precise prospect lists:

  • Intent data analysis across 250+ data points
  • Company funding and revenue validation
  • Industry-specific behavioral signals
  • Custom ICP (Ideal Customer Profile) validation using AI
  • Organizational hierarchy mapping for key decision-makers We reject the “cookie-cutter” approach, ensuring each prospect list is tailored to your specific offerings.

Our RevOps integration includes:

  • Modern tech stack leverage
  • Seamless CRM integration
  • Marketing and sales automation alignment
  • Data cleansing and organization
  • System configuration and optimization
  • Company-wide technology integration
  • Prevention of stale data through automated updates

We create secondary domains that redirect to yours. Our domain protection follows three core steps:

  • Technical Setup: Complete domain authentication and infrastructure setup with SPF, DKIM, and DMARC protocols to ensure maximum deliverability
  • Smart Sending: AI-powered content verification combined with strategic volume control and timing to maintain zero-spam rates
  • Active Monitoring: 24/7 real-time monitoring with instant alerts and proactive issue resolution to protect your reputation

Our analytics package includes:

  • Real-time performance dashboards
  • Conversion tracking at each stage
  • Revenue impact analysis
  • Reply rate monitoring
  • Opportunity tracking
  • ROI calculations
  • Year-over-year growth analysis

Our process stands out through:

  • Real-time data validation
  • Multi-source data aggregation
  • Automated enrichment workflows
  • Custom insight generation
  • Prospect behavior tracking
  • Intent signal monitoring
  • Continuous data freshness checks

We provide comprehensive CRM integration:

  • Full system configuration
  • Lead management automation
  • Data cleaning and organization
  • Workflow automation setup
  • Performance tracking implementation
  • Cross-platform synchronization
  • Regular data health checks

We implement strategic workflows including:

  • We design ads, sales landing pages, lead surveys, and all the other bells and whistles in under a 2 weeks , included G4 website tracking
  • Timed engagement sequences (e.g., 60-minute wait periods)
  • Automated email triggers
  • Strategic follow-up sequences
  • Multi-touch point coordination
  • Performance tracking and optimization
  • Custom timing based on prospect behavior

We follow a structured 6-month roadmap:

  • Month 1: AI-assisted strategy development and initial prospecting framework
  • Month 2: Technical and content optimization of prospecting channels
  • Month 3: Content enhancement using AI and expert network
  • Month 4: 90-day performance analysis and strategy refinement
  • Month 5: Data-driven growth expansion
  • Month 6+: Implementation of recurring prospecting systems

Do You Have a
Product and Channel Fit?

Where you are seen matters! Ensure that every channel is relevant to your buyer, not a catch-all!

Talk To Expert

What impacts your audience? Not what you think, but what they tell you.

Market Positioning

You need to explain to each segment the value you and your product bring them. This is where your brand and product strategy combine.

Value Objectives

This is your funnel stage! Setting clear objectives and building a unique sales funnel for your target market.

Bridging the gap between marketing innovation and measurable business impact.
